parameters.text:
={{ '📊 Daily Revenue Rollup — ' + $json.date + '
Total: $' + $json.summary.revenue_total + ' (' + $json.summary.orders_total + ' orders)
IS: $' + $json.summary.revenue_is + ' | Etsy: $' + $json.summary.revenue_etsy + ' | Gumroad: $' + $json.summary.revenue_gumroad + '
OrderBump: ' + (($json.summary.orderbump_rate * 100).toFixed(1)) + '% | OTO: ' + (($json.summary.oto_rate * 100).toFixed(1)) + '% | 30d Refund: ' + (($json.summary.refund_rate_rolling_30 * 100).toFixed(1)) + '%
Top product: ' + ($json.summary.top_products[0]?.sku || 'n/a') + ' ($' + ($json.summary.top_products[0]?.revenue || 0) + ')
Reconciled: ' + ($json.reconciled ? '✅' : '⚠️ ' + JSON.stringify($json.discrepancies)) }}
